source_name: European Banking Authority
title: ​The EBA launches Discussion Paper on Pillar 3 Data Hub for small banks
clean_title: ​The EBA launches Discussion Paper on Pillar 3 Data Hub for small banks
summary: ​The European Banking Authority (EBA) today published a Discussion Paper which proposes a simplified process for small and non-complex institutions (SNCIs) when implementing the Pillar 3 Data Hub (P3DH). The objective is to gather stakeholder feedback on a streamlined approach under which the EBA would collect and perform the calculation and publication of Pillar 3 disclosures for SNCIs, thereby reducing the burden for the latter.
why_selected: Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; information très récente.
impacts: Impact métier modéré mais utile pour maintenir une veille sectorielle structurée.
title_signature: banks data discussion eba hub launches paper pillar small
normalized_title: the eba launches discussion paper on pillar 3 data hub for small banks
